Video.summary: Step inside a busy Bondi tattoo studio where tourists, backpackers and local hipsters flock to get inked. A brother and sister remember Mum and a Russian burlesque dancer shocks the staff.
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 1

Video.summary: Grand Final day in Bondi sees Brit boys mixing it up with quirky tatts and belly bling, a young Mother’s first time braving the needle and a visit from the studios eldest client – an 83 year old grandmother.
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 2

Video.summary: A new father commemorates birth, whilst a heartbroken son laments his loss. A client inspires with her brave attitude, and a recent divorcee gets inked for his new girl - but will their relationship survive the sitting?
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 3

Video.summary: John and Wendy put a potential new artist through the ringer, as Josh struggles to maintain order. Navy brothers on a mission and a breast cancer survivor marking her courage are followed by a night of hilarious antics.
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 4

Video.summary: Loud, proud footy fans ink their loyalty, while Aaron celebrates a different kind of faith. Dan helps a client through crippling pain, and as one extreme ink addict sends a message to society, so does ‘glamazon’ Mink.
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 5

Video.summary: From the guilty to the most innocent – and everything in between. Tensions peak as a staff meeting kicks off a busy day. A baby, a criminal, a heart wrenching loss, a pole dancer, a pin-up, and the biggest tattoo yet.
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 6

Video.summary: It’s a battle of the sexes for the highest pain threshold. Country girl Cas celebrates her new found confidence, while Rachel mourns her past. A risky tatt for Nan and patience wears thin as the studio is invaded by ‘blokes.’
Video.title: Tattoo Tales Episode 7

Video.summary: Lee explores the other side to Queensland’s Gold Coast – its stunning hinterland and learns some tricks to cooking delicious cuisine from the USA. Rhys and Coxy take it up a notch in Yarrawonga, on the Victorian and New South Wales border.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 8

Video.summary: Rhys shares the secrets of Phillip Island - his hometown on Victoria’s rugged coastline. Lee travels to Alice Springs on the hunt for bush tucker, and Coxy enjoys the Queensland sunshine and plenty of activities in tropical Mackay.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 9

Video.summary: In this China special, Rhys soars above the clouds on his way up one of China’s most spectacular mountains, Geoff Cox takes in the sights in Tianjin, and Rhys visits Fenghuang, a picturesque city that hasn’t changed in three hundred years.
Video.title: Just Go Episode 10

Video.summary: Meet the Joneses: an ordinary family living extraordinary lives at a vast cattle property called Coolabah in the heart of the Top End.
Video.title: Keeping Up With The Joneses Episode 1

Image.alt: Keeping Up With The Joneses Episode 1
Keeping Up With The Joneses Episode 1
Keeping Up With The Joneses Episode 1

Video.summary: FREMANTLE The major port of Australia’s remote west coast, Fremantle began life as a place of punishment. But the ethnically diverse port city has since been the sight of some of Australia’s greatest triumphs… and disappointments.
Video.title: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 1

Image.alt: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 1
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 1
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 1

Video.summary: MELBOURNE The real story of Melbourne isn’t found in the grand tree-lined boulevards or boomtown architecture. It’s hidden down the lanes and alleyways.
Video.title: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 2

Image.alt: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 2
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 2
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 2

Video.summary: HOBART You need only scratch the surface to find evidence of Hobart’s convict past – but dig a little deeper and even more fascinating history is revealed.
Video.title: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 3

Image.alt: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 3
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 3
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 3

Video.summary: WOOLLOOMOOLOO From the Razor gangs of the 1930s to the Heritage Battles of the 1960s, Woolloomooloo has seen it all.
Video.title: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 4

Image.alt: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 4
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 4
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 1 Episode 4

Video.summary: In an emotion charged episode, Chris is on a desperate rescue mission to save the life of a frail 3 day old orphan foal. Brulee has lost his mum, and won't survive unless Chris can find him a surrogate. But it's no guarantee a mare will accept the little foal.
Video.title: Bondi Vet Season 7 Episode 1

Video.summary: Chris meets a labradoodle with a chronic sneezing problem. 2 year old Lulu suffers massive sneezing fits up to 4 times a day, and her devoted owner Kim is desperate for help. Chris fears Lulu may have a tumour.
Video.title: Bondi Vet Season 7 Episode 2

Video.summary: Chris has been invited to Abu Dhabi after a special invitation to visit an extraordinary veterinary hospital. The hospital is for sick and injured falcons, and they are treated like royalty. Chris has to preform delicate surgery on a falcon wing.
Video.title: Bondi Vet Season 7 Episode 3

Video.summary: A tiny kitten has been found abandoned in a cardboard box, and Chris is shocked at the extent of her injuries. She desperately needs surgery to try to repair her shattered leg. Then it's a heartwarming search to find her a new home.
Video.title: Bondi Vet Season 7 Episode 4

Video.summary: The finale to Chris's trip is an unforgettable encounter with some of China's precious Giant Pandas. Chris is granted the rare privilege of hand feeding some youngsters. He's then allowed into the most sacred area of all - the panda kindergarten to meet the adorable babies.
Video.title: Bondi Vet Season 7 Episode 5

Video.summary: Chris is confronted with an unusual patient, an albino echidna. But there's a question mark over whether the extremely rare echidna is a male or a female. It will have to be anaesthetised so Chris can investigate.
Video.title: Bondi Vet Season 7 Episode 6

Video.summary: Christchurch For 160 years, the green, garden city of Christchurch was the antipodean England. Two devastating earthquakes changed that forever, but they haven’t destroyed the city’s will.
Video.title: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 3

Image.alt: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 3
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 3
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 3

Video.summary: Canberra If you thought Canberra was nothing but pollies and public buildings…think again. Tony’s walk through the nation’s bush capital proves that the city is chock-a-block with some very surprising hidden history.
Video.title: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 4

Image.alt: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 4
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 4
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 4

Video.summary: Barossa Tony swaps his walking shoes for a steering wheel as his biggest walk yet takes him to the beautiful towns and wineries of South Australia’s Barossa Valley.
Video.title: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 5

Image.alt: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 5
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 5
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 5

Video.summary: Wellington, the tiny capital city perched at the bottom of the North Island is set to become the Hollywood of the Pacific, thanks to visionary filmmaker Sir Peter Jackson.
Video.title: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 6

Image.alt: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 6
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 6
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 6

Video.summary: Tim wants Chris to find out why Jack the koala has suddenly developed nasty bumps all over his face. Chris is so concerned, they take the little 2 year old to the local clinic for an immediate biopsy. When the results come back Tim is astonished to learn that Jack has acne.
Video.title: Bondi Vet Season 7 Episode 13

Video.summary: A dairy buffalo called Penny has severely deformed horns, which are growing into her skull, dangerously close to her brain. Chris has to try to corral the timid 10 year old, and then carry out the painstaking job of carefully removing the horns.
Video.title: Bondi Vet Season 7 Episode 14

Video.summary: Chris is heading out to sea, to help try to save an endangered Grey Nurse shark, which has been spotted entangled in fishing line and with a hook stuck in its mouth. A specialist rescue team has been assembled and Chris is joining them in the water, to try to corral the injured shark so it can be brought to the surface.
Video.title: Bondi Vet Season 7 Episode 15

Video.summary: Chris is helping out at the Marlin Coast veterinary hospital in Cairns. His first patient is a young dog which has had a nasty encounter with a hedgecutter. Misty has ended up with deep cuts across her nose. How the young dog avoided more disastrous injuries is a miracle.
Video.title: Bondi Vet Season 7 Episode 16

Video.summary: Chris is helping out at the Marlin Coast veterinary hospital in Cairns, and his first patient is a rare Fijian iguana Called Ako. The Iguana hasn't been himself, and isn't eating properly. Chris needs to do an x-ray to try to work out what's going on. The results reveal a massive bladder stone inside the small animal, and he needs immediate surgery.
Video.title: Bondi Vet Season 7 Episode 17

Video.summary: A little joey has been brought in to Chris at the Bondi clinic after its mother was hit and killed by a car. It's feared the frail orphan may have a broken leg, but carer Sandy is determined to give the little battler a chance. It's a huge challenge for Chris to try to repair the leg. It's a heart stopping moment when he finds if the risky surgery has been a success.
Video.title: Bondi Vet Season 7 Episode 18

Video.summary: Townsville Tony’s itchy feet take him to tropical Townsville. Plenty of war history here, but as usual, it’s the hidden history that uncovers the not-so-well known side of a far North Queensland treasure.
Video.title: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 7

Image.alt: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 7
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 7
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 7

Video.summary: Parramatta Sydney’s city within a city has always been home to some of Australia’s most important colonial history. But in modern times, the one-time breadbasket of the colony is re-inventing itself as a multi-cultural hub.
Video.title: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 8

Image.alt: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 8
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 8
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 8

Video.summary: Geelong missed out on being Victoria’s capital thanks to a quirk of nature, but this beautiful seaside town doesn’t lack for unusual history.
Video.title: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 9

Image.alt: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 9
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 9
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 9

Video.summary: Alice Springs is a tiny speck in a vast, red, dry interior…but it’s a fertile oasis of historical highlights…
Video.title: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 10

Image.alt: Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 10
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 10
Tony Robinson's Time Walks Season 2 Episode 10

Video.summary: Tony Robinson embarks on a quest to unearth the history behind the East London of his formative years and discover the origins of the 2012 Olympic Games that are transforming it.
Video.title: Tony Robinson's London Games Unearthed
